name: joel-skills
description: Joel's personal skills: focus-toolkit (ADHD-friendly focus tools), joel-brand (personal brand styling), qc-gate (deliverable QC check), client-intake (client onboarding interview + profile), discovery-form (client-facing discovery questionnaire + scope mapping), case-study (build-to-portfolio write-up), ediscovery-research (docs-grounded eDiscovery/EDRM research + cert study), os-audit (Claude OS health audit: scorecard, gaps, build queue), sop-builder (process-to-SOP interview with flowchart; HTML/PDF/Word output), and humanize (strip AI-sounding patterns from client emails and website copy).
